summary: The balcony presents as a modern external space with dark composite decking, black metal balustrading and light painted walls/structural surrounds. Overall it appears in good condition and reasonably clean, with only minor surface marks visible on the flooring and no obvious structural damage. The adjoining glazed door and framing appear intact and the view beyond indicates the balcony is located within a contemporary apartment development.

items.name: Walls
items.description: External balcony walls and structural surrounds in light painted finish.

items.name: Ceiling/soffit
items.description: Overhead balcony soffit/underside of upper balcony in light painted finish, as visible in the upper portions of the external views.

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Dark grey composite decking boards laid lengthways to the balcony floor.
defects: small white speck/debris visible on floor surface mid level

items.name: Balustrade
items.description: Black metal balcony balustrade with horizontal top rail and vertical metal spindles.

items.name: Glazed balcony door
items.description: Large full-height glazed sliding/bi-fold style balcony door with dark frame.

items.name: Door frame and threshold
items.description: Dark metal door frame and threshold strip to the balcony access opening.

items.name: Exterior wall vent/grille
items.description: Black louvre-style wall vent/grille mounted high on the balcony wall.

items.name: Threshold strip
items.description: Slim metal threshold strip at the balcony door line.
